basic_details.job_title: NAM Chandrapur Part Time Yoga Teacher/Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Ayush Mission Chandrapur (NAM Chandrapur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Yoga degree/diploma (minimum 2 years) from recognized university/institute
qualification.details: Yoga Prashikshak: Yoga degree/diploma (minimum 2 years) from a recognized university/institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAM Chandrapur Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
